excluded.name: Alchemy Clear Silver to Gold Transparent, Double-rolled, Iridescent, rainbow, 3 mm, Fusible
excluded.reason: kiln-transformative: ships silver-toned and only develops its named color ('Alchemy Clear Silver to Gold Transparent, Double-rolled, Iridescent, rainbow, 3 mm, Fusible') when kiln-fused; cold-process (foil/came) users never trigger the transformation, so any render misrepresents what ships (WYSIWYG). Distinct mechanism from strikers.
